duas.title: Before sleeping
duas.arabic: بِاسْمِكَ اللَّهُمَّ أَمُوتُ وَأَحْيَا
duas.transliteration: Bismika Allahumma amutu wa ahya
duas.meaning: In Your name, O Allah, I die and I live.

duas.title: Upon waking up
duas.arabic: الحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَحْيَانَا بَعْدَ مَا أَمَاتَنَا وَإِلَيْهِ النُّشُورُ
duas.transliteration: Alhamdu lillahil-lathee ahyana ba'da ma amatana wa ilayhin-nushur
duas.meaning: All praise is for Allah who gave us life after having taken it from us, and unto Him is the resurrection.

duas.title: Morning remembrance
duas.arabic: أَصْبَحْنَا وَأَصْبَحَ المُلْكُ لِلَّهِ وَالحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ
duas.transliteration: Asbahna wa asbahal-mulku lillah, walhamdu lillah, la ilaha illallahu wahdahu la shareeka lah
duas.meaning: We have reached the morning and at this very time the whole kingdom belongs to Allah.

duas.title: Evening remembrance
duas.arabic: أَمْسَيْنَا وَأَمْسَى المُلْكُ لِلَّهِ وَالحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ
duas.transliteration: Amsayna wa amsal-mulku lillah, walhamdu lillah, la ilaha illallahu wahdahu la shareeka lah
duas.meaning: We have reached the evening and at this very time the whole kingdom belongs to Allah.

duas.title: Opening du'a in prayer
duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ اللَّهُمَّ وَبِحَمْدِكَ وَتَبَارَكَ اسْمُكَ وَتَعَالَى جَدُّكَ وَلَا إِلَهَ غَيْرُكَ
duas.transliteration: Subhanaka Allahumma wa bihamdika, wa tabarakasmuka, wa ta'ala jadduka, wa la ilaha ghayruk
duas.meaning: Glory is to You, O Allah, and praise. Blessed is Your Name and exalted is Your majesty.

duas.title: After Tashahhud (before Salam)
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ عَذَابِ جَهَنَّمَ وَمِنْ عَذَابِ القَبْرِ وَمِنْ فِتْنَةِ المَحْيَا وَالمَمَاتِ وَمِنْ شَرِّ فِتْنَةِ المَسِيحِ الدَّجَّالِ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika min 'adhabi jahannam, wa min 'adhabil-qabr, wa min fitnatil-mahya wal-mamat, wa min sharri fitnatil-masihid-dajjal
duas.meaning: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the punishment of Hellfire, the grave, trials of life and death, and the Dajjal.

duas.title: Between the two prostrations
duas.arabic: رَبِّ اغْفِرْ لِي رَبِّ اغْفِرْ لِي
duas.transliteration: Rabbighfir lee, Rabbighfir lee
duas.meaning: My Lord, forgive me. My Lord, forgive me.

duas.title: In Sujood (prostration)
duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَ رَبِّيَ الأَعْلَى
duas.transliteration: Subhana Rabbiyal-A'la
duas.meaning: Glory is to my Lord, the Most High.

duas.title: In Ruku (bowing)
duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَ رَبِّيَ العَظِيمِ
duas.transliteration: Subhana Rabbiyal-'Adheem
duas.meaning: Glory is to my Lord, the Most Great.

duas.title: After completing prayer
duas.arabic: أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللهَ، أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللهَ، أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللهَ، اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ السَّلَامُ وَمِنْكَ السَّلَامُ تَبَارَكْتَ يَا ذَا الجَلَالِ وَالإِكْرَامِ
duas.transliteration: Astaghfirullah, Astaghfirullah, Astaghfirullah. Allahumma Antas-Salamu wa minkas-salamu tabarakta ya Thal-Jalali wal-Ikram
duas.meaning: I seek the forgiveness of Allah (3 times). O Allah, You are Peace and from You comes peace.

duas.title: Before eating
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللهِ
duas.transliteration: Bismillah
duas.meaning: In the name of Allah.

duas.title: When forgetting Bismillah
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللهِ أَوَّلَهُ وَآخِرَهُ
duas.transliteration: Bismillahi awwalahu wa akhirah
duas.meaning: In the name of Allah, at the beginning and at the end.

duas.title: After eating
duas.arabic: الحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَطْعَمَنِي هَذَا وَرَزَقَنِيهِ مِنْ غَيْرِ حَوْلٍ مِنِّي وَلَا قُوَّةٍ
duas.transliteration: Alhamdu lillahil-lathee at'amani hadha wa razaqaneehi, min ghayri hawlin minnee wa la quwwah
duas.meaning: All praise is for Allah who fed me this and provided it for me without any might or power from me.

duas.title: When breaking fast (Iftar)
duas.arabic: ذَهَبَ الظَّمَأُ وَابْتَلَّتِ العُرُوقُ وَثَبَتَ الأَجْرُ إِنْ شَاءَ اللهُ
duas.transliteration: Dhahaba adh-dhama'u wabtallatil-'urooqu wa thabatal-ajru in sha Allah
duas.meaning: The thirst has gone, the veins are moistened, and the reward is confirmed, if Allah wills.

duas.title: Du'a for the host
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَطْعِمْ مَنْ أَطْعَمَنِي وَاسْقِ مَنْ سَقَانِي
duas.transliteration: Allahumma at'im man at'amani wasqi man saqani
duas.meaning: O Allah, feed the one who fed me and give drink to the one who gave me drink.

duas.title: Du'a for travelling
duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي سَخَّرَ لَنَا هَذَا وَمَا كُنَّا لَهُ مُقْرِنِينَ وَإِنَّا إِلَى رَبِّنَا لَمُنْقَلِبُونَ
duas.transliteration: Subhanal-lathee sakhkhara lana hadha wa ma kunna lahu muqrineen, wa inna ila Rabbina lamunqaliboon
duas.meaning: Glory unto Him who created this transportation for us, though we were unable to create it on our own.

duas.title: Entering a town or city
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ السَّمَاوَاتِ السَّبْعِ وَمَا أَظْلَلْنَ وَرَبَّ الأَرَضِينَ السَّبْعِ وَمَا أَقْلَلْنَ أَسْأَلُكَ خَيْرَ هَذِهِ القَرْيَةِ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma Rabbas-samawatis-sab'i wa ma adhlalna, wa Rabbal-aradinas-sab'i wa ma aqlalna, as'aluka khayra hathihil-qaryah
duas.meaning: O Allah, Lord of the seven heavens and earths, I ask You for the goodness of this town.

duas.title: Returning from travel
duas.arabic: آيِبُونَ تَائِبُونَ عَابِدُونَ لِرَبِّنَا حَامِدُونَ
duas.transliteration: Ayiboona, ta'iboona, 'abidoona, li Rabbina hamidoon
duas.meaning: We return, repenting, worshipping, and praising our Lord.

duas.title: Ayatul Kursi (excerpt)
duas.arabic: اللَّهُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الحَيُّ القَيُّومُ لَا تَأْخُذُهُ سِنَةٌ وَلَا نَوْمٌ
duas.transliteration: Allahu la ilaha illa Huwal-Hayyul-Qayyum, la ta'khuthuhu sinatun wa la nawm
duas.meaning: Allah! There is no god but He, the Living, the Self-subsisting. Neither slumber nor sleep overtakes Him.

duas.title: Morning/Evening protection
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللهِ الَّذِي لَا يَضُرُّ مَعَ اسْمِهِ شَيْءٌ فِي الأَرْضِ وَلَا فِي السَّمَاءِ وَهُوَ السَّمِيعُ العَلِيمُ
duas.transliteration: Bismillahil-lathee la yadurru ma'asmihi shay'un fil-ardi wa la fis-sama'i, wa Huwas-Samee'ul-'Aleem
duas.meaning: In the name of Allah, with whose name nothing in the earth or heaven can cause harm.

duas.title: Du'a for anxiety and sorrow
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الهَمِّ وَالحَزَنِ وَالعَجْزِ وَالكَسَلِ وَالبُخْلِ وَالجُبْنِ وَضَلَعِ الدَّيْنِ وَغَلَبَةِ الرِّجَالِ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika minal-hammi wal-hazan, wal-'ajzi wal-kasal, wal-bukhli wal-jubn, wa dala'id-dayni wa ghalabatir-rijal
duas.meaning: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from anxiety, sorrow, weakness, laziness, miserliness, cowardice, debt and being overpowered.

duas.title: Protection from evil eye
duas.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِكَلِمَاتِ اللهِ التَّامَّاتِ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ
duas.transliteration: A'udhu bikalimatil-lahit-tammati min sharri ma khalaq
duas.meaning: I seek refuge in the perfect words of Allah from the evil of what He has created.

duas.title: Entering the masjid
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ افْتَحْ لِي أَبْوَابَ رَحْمَتِكَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma aftah lee abwaba rahmatik
duas.meaning: O Allah, open the gates of Your mercy for me.

duas.title: Leaving the masjid
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka min fadlik
duas.meaning: O Allah, I ask You from Your bounty.

duas.title: Entering the bathroom
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللهِ اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الخُبُثِ وَالخَبَائِثِ
duas.transliteration: Bismillah, Allahumma inni a'udhu bika minal-khubuthi wal-khaba'ith
duas.meaning: In the name of Allah. O Allah, I seek refuge in You from evil spirits.

duas.title: Leaving the bathroom
duas.arabic: غُفْرَانَكَ
duas.transliteration: Ghufranaka
duas.meaning: I ask You (Allah) for forgiveness.

duas.title: When wearing new clothes
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لَكَ الحَمْدُ أَنْتَ كَسَوْتَنِيهِ أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ خَيْرِهِ وَخَيْرِ مَا صُنِعَ لَهُ وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّهِ وَشَرِّ مَا صُنِعَ لَهُ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma lakal-hamdu anta kasawtaneehi, as'aluka min khayrihi wa khayri ma suni'a lahu, wa a'udhu bika min sharrihi wa sharri ma suni'a lah
duas.meaning: O Allah, praise is to You. You have clothed me. I ask You for its goodness and seek refuge from its evil.

duas.title: When looking in the mirror
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ حَسَّنْتَ خَلْقِي فَحَسِّنْ خُلُقِي
duas.transliteration: Allahumma anta hassanta khalqi fahassin khuluqi
duas.meaning: O Allah, just as You have made my external features beautiful, make my character beautiful as well.

duas.title: Sayyidul Istighfar
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ رَبِّي لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ خَلَقْتَنِي وَأَنَا عَبْدُكَ وَأَنَا عَلَى عَهْدِكَ وَوَعْدِكَ مَا اسْتَطَعْتُ أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا صَنَعْتُ أَبُوءُ لَكَ بِنِعْمَتِكَ عَلَيَّ وَأَبُوءُ بِذَنْبِي فَاغْفِرْ لِي فَإِنَّهُ لَا يَغْفِرُ الذُّنُوبَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma anta Rabbi la ilaha illa anta, khalaqtani wa ana 'abduka, wa ana 'ala 'ahdika wa wa'dika mastata't. A'udhu bika min sharri ma sana't, abu'u laka bini'matika 'alayya, wa abu'u bidhanbi faghfir lee fa innahu la yaghfirudh-dhunuba illa ant
duas.meaning: O Allah, You are my Lord, none has the right to be worshipped except You. You created me and I am Your servant. I acknowledge Your favour and my sin, so forgive me.

duas.title: Evening protection (3 Quls)
duas.arabic: قُلْ هُوَ اللَّهُ أَحَدٌ · قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ الْفَلَقِ · قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ النَّاسِ
duas.transliteration: Qul Huwal-lahu Ahad · Qul A'udhu bi Rabbil-Falaq · Qul A'udhu bi Rabbin-Nas
duas.meaning: Recite Surah Al-Ikhlas, Al-Falaq, and An-Nas three times each in the evening for complete protection.

duas.title: Seeking forgiveness
duas.arabic: أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللهَ الَّذِي لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الحَيُّ القَيُّومُ وَأَتُوبُ إِلَيْهِ
duas.transliteration: Astaghfirullal-lathee la ilaha illa Huwal-Hayyul-Qayyoomu wa atoobu ilayh
duas.meaning: I seek the forgiveness of Allah, there is no god but He, the Living, the Self-Subsisting, and I repent to Him.

duas.title: Du'a of Yunus (peace be upon him)
duas.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ سُبْحَانَكَ إِنِّي كُنْتُ مِنَ الظَّالِمِينَ
duas.transliteration: La ilaha illa anta subhanaka inni kuntu minadh-dhalimeen
duas.meaning: There is no deity except You; exalted are You. Indeed, I have been of the wrongdoers.

duas.title: Repentance du'a
duas.arabic: رَبِّ اغْفِرْ لِي وَتُبْ عَلَيَّ إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ التَّوَّابُ الرَّحِيمُ
duas.transliteration: Rabbighfir lee wa tub 'alayya innaka antat-Tawwabur-Raheem
duas.meaning: My Lord, forgive me and accept my repentance. Indeed, You are the Accepting of repentance, the Merciful.

duas.title: Du'a for beneficial knowledge
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ عِلْمًا نَافِعًا وَرِزْقًا طَيِّبًا وَعَمَلًا مُتَقَبَّلًا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka 'ilman nafi'an, wa rizqan tayyiban, wa 'amalan mutaqabbalan
duas.meaning: O Allah, I ask You for beneficial knowledge, good provision, and accepted deeds.

duas.title: Du'a for increase in knowledge
duas.arabic: رَبِّ زِدْنِي عِلْمًا
duas.transliteration: Rabbi zidni 'ilma
duas.meaning: My Lord, increase me in knowledge.

duas.title: Du'a for understanding
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ فَقِّهْنِي فِي الدِّينِ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma faqqihni fid-deen
duas.meaning: O Allah, grant me understanding of the religion.

duas.title: Du'a for good health
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ عَافِنِي فِي بَدَنِي اللَّهُمَّ عَافِنِي فِي سَمْعِي اللَّهُمَّ عَافِنِي فِي بَصَرِي لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma 'afini fi badani, Allahumma 'afini fi sam'i, Allahumma 'afini fi basari, la ilaha illa ant
duas.meaning: O Allah, grant me health in my body, hearing, and sight. None has the right to be worshipped but You.

duas.title: When visiting the sick
duas.arabic: لَا بَأْسَ طَهُورٌ إِنْ شَاءَ اللهُ
duas.transliteration: La ba'sa tahurun in sha Allah
duas.meaning: No worry, it is a purification, if Allah wills.

duas.title: Du'a for cure
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ النَّاسِ أَذْهِبِ البَأْسَ اشْفِ أَنْتَ الشَّافِي لَا شِفَاءَ إِلَّا شِفَاؤُكَ شِفَاءً لَا يُغَادِرُ سَقَمًا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma Rabban-nas, adhhibil-ba's, ishfi antash-Shafi, la shifa'a illa shifa'uka, shifa'an la yughadiru saqama
duas.meaning: O Allah, Lord of mankind, remove the affliction. Cure, for You are the One who cures.

duas.title: Du'a when in pain
duas.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِعِزَّةِ اللهِ وَقُدْرَتِهِ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا أَجِدُ وَأُحَاذِرُ
duas.transliteration: A'udhu bi'izzatillahi wa qudratihi min sharri ma ajidu wa uhadhir
duas.meaning: I seek refuge in the might and power of Allah from the evil of what I feel and what I fear.

duas.title: At Miqat (Ihram)
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أُرِيدُ الْعُمْرَةَ فَيَسِّرْهَا لِي وَتَقَبَّلْهَا مِنِّي
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni uridul-'umrata fa yassirha lee wa taqabbalha minnee
duas.meaning: O Allah, I intend to perform Umrah, so make it easy for me and accept it from me.

duas.title: Talbiyah
duas.arabic: لَبَّيْكَ اللَّهُمَّ لَبَّيْكَ، لَبَّيْكَ لَا شَرِيكَ لَكَ لَبَّيْكَ، إِنَّ الْحَمْدَ وَالنِّعْمَةَ لَكَ وَالْمُلْكَ، لَا شَرِيكَ لَكَ
duas.transliteration: Labbayk Allahumma Labbayk, Labbayka la shareeka laka Labbayk, innal-hamda wan-ni'mata laka wal-mulk, la shareeka lak
duas.meaning: Here I am, O Allah, here I am. Here I am, You have no partner, here I am. Verily all praise and blessings are Yours, and all sovereignty, You have no partner.

duas.title: Entering Makkah
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْ فِي قَلْبِي نُورًا وَفِي لِسَانِي نُورًا وَاجْعَلْ فِي سَمْعِي نُورًا وَاجْعَلْ فِي بَصَرِي نُورًا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma-j'al fi qalbee nooran, wa fee lisani nooran, waj-'al fee sam'ee nooran, waj-'al fee basaree nooran
duas.meaning: O Allah, place light in my heart, on my tongue, in my hearing, and in my sight.

duas.title: Seeing the Ka'bah
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ زِدْ هَذَا الْبَيْتَ تَشْرِيفًا وَتَعْظِيمًا وَتَكْرِيمًا وَمَهَابَةً
duas.transliteration: Allahumma zid hadhal-bayta tashreefan wa ta'dheeman wa takreeman wa mahabah
duas.meaning: O Allah, increase this House in honor, greatness, respect, and reverence.

duas.title: During Tawaf (between Rukn Yamani & Black Stone)
duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَفِي الْآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ
duas.transliteration: Rabbana atina fid-dunya hasanatan wa fil-akhirati hasanatan wa qina 'adhaban-nar
duas.meaning: Our Lord, give us good in this world and good in the Hereafter, and protect us from the Fire.

duas.title: At Multazam
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّ هَذَا الْبَيْتَ بَيْتُكَ وَالْحَرَمَ حَرَمُكَ وَالْأَمْنَ أَمْنُكَ وَالْعَبْدَ عَبْدُكَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inna hadhal-bayta baytuka, wal-harama haramuka, wal-amna amnuka, wal-'abda 'abduka
duas.meaning: O Allah, this House is Your House, this Sanctuary is Your Sanctuary, this security is Your security, and I am Your servant.

duas.title: Between Safa and Marwah
duas.arabic: إِنَّ الصَّفَا وَالْمَرْوَةَ مِنْ شَعَائِرِ اللَّهِ
duas.transliteration: Innas-Safa wal-Marwata min sha'a'irillah
duas.meaning: Indeed, As-Safa and Al-Marwah are among the symbols of Allah.

duas.title: After completing Sa'i
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي وَارْحَمْنِي وَاهْدِنِي وَعَافِنِي وَارْزُقْنِي
duas.transliteration: Allahumma ghfir lee, warhamnee, wahdinee, wa 'afinee, warzuqnee
duas.meaning: O Allah, forgive me, have mercy on me, guide me, grant me health, and provide for me.

duas.title: After shaving/clipping hair
duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ عَلَى مَا هَدَانَا وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ عَلَى مَا رَزَقَنَا
duas.transliteration: Alhamdu lillahi 'ala ma hadana, walhamdu lillahi 'ala ma razaqana
duas.meaning: All praise is for Allah for guiding us, and all praise is for Allah for providing for us.

duas.title: Hajj intention at Miqat
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أُرِيدُ الْحَجَّ فَيَسِّرْهُ لِي وَتَقَبَّلْهُ مِنِّي
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni uridul-hajja fa yassirhu lee wa taqabbalhu minnee
duas.meaning: O Allah, I intend to perform Hajj, so make it easy for me and accept it from me.

duas.title: Day of Arafah
duas.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
duas.transliteration: La ilaha illallahu wahdahu la shareeka lah, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamdu wa huwa 'ala kulli shay'in qadeer
duas.meaning: There is no god but Allah alone, with no partner. His is the dominion and His is the praise, and He is over all things competent.

duas.title: At Muzdalifah
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اجْمَعْ لَنَا شَمْلَنَا وَفَرِّقْ بَيْنَنَا وَبَيْنَ الذُّنُوبِ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma-jma' lana shamlana wa farriq baynana wa baynadhdhunoob
duas.meaning: O Allah, unite our hearts and separate us from sins.

duas.title: Stoning the Jamarat
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْهُ حَجًّا مَبْرُورًا وَسَعْيًا مَشْكُورًا وَذَنْبًا مَغْفُورًا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma-j'alhu hajjan mabrooran, wa sa'yan mashkooran, wa dhanban maghfooran
duas.meaning: O Allah, make this an accepted Hajj, a thanked effort, and a forgiven sin.

duas.title: After completing Hajj
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لَا تَجْعَلْهُ آخِرَ الْعَهْدِ مِنْ بَيْتِكَ الْحَرَامِ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma la taj'alhu akhiral-'ahdi min baytikal-haram
duas.meaning: O Allah, do not make this the last time I visit Your Sacred House.

duas.title: Visiting Prophet's Mosque
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ كَمَا صَلَّيْتَ عَلَى إِبْرَاهِيمَ وَعَلَى آلِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma salli 'ala Muhammadin wa 'ala ali Muhammadin kama sallayta 'ala Ibraheema wa 'ala ali Ibraheem
duas.meaning: O Allah, send prayers upon Muhammad and his family as You sent prayers upon Ibrahim and his family.

duas.title: For Parents
duas.arabic: رَبِّ ارْحَمْهُمَا كَمَا رَبَّيَانِي صَغِيرًا
duas.transliteration: Rabbir hamhuma kama rabbayani saghira
duas.meaning: My Lord, have mercy upon them as they brought me up when I was small.

duas.title: For Spouse
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ ارْزُقْنِي حُبَّهَا وَحُبَّ مَا يُقَرِّبُنِي إِلَيْهَا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma urzuqni hubbaha wa hubba ma yuqarribuni ilayha
duas.meaning: O Allah, grant me love for her and love for what brings me closer to You.

duas.title: For Children
duas.arabic: رَبِّ اجْعَلْنِي مُقِيمَ الصَّلَاةِ وَمِنْ ذُرِّيَّتِي
duas.transliteration: Rabbij-alni muqimas-salati wa min dhurriyyati
duas.meaning: My Lord, make me an establisher of prayer, and from my descendants.

duas.title: Before Reading Quran
duas.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِاللهِ مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ الرَّجِيمِ
duas.transliteration: A'udhu billahi minash-shaytanir-rajim
duas.meaning: I seek refuge in Allah from the accursed Satan.

duas.title: After Reading Quran
duas.arabic: صَدَقَ اللهُ الْعَلِيُّ الْعَظِيمُ
duas.transliteration: Sadaqallahul-'Aliyyul-'Adheem
duas.meaning: Allah, the Most High, the Most Great, has spoken the truth.

duas.title: For Debt
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اكْفِنِي بِحَلَالِكَ عَنْ حَرَامِكَ وَأَغْنِنِي بِفَضْلِكَ عَمَّنْ سِوَاكَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma ikfini bihalalika 'an haramika wa aghnini bifadlika 'amman siwak
duas.meaning: O Allah, suffice me with what You have made lawful instead of unlawful, and make me independent of all besides You.

duas.title: Against Enemy
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ عَضُدِي وَنَصِيرِي عَلَيْكَ أَكُولُ وَبِكَ أَصُولُ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma anta 'ududi wa nasiri, 'ayka akulu wa bika asulu
duas.meaning: O Allah, You are my support and my helper, in You I trust and by You I fight.

duas.title: When Rain Falls
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَيِّبًا نَافِعًا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma sayyiban nafi'a
duas.meaning: O Allah, make it a beneficial rain.

duas.title: Strong Wind
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ خَيْرَهَا وَخَيْرَ مَا فِيهَا وَخَيْرَ مَا أُرْسِلَتْ بِهِ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka khayraha wa khayra ma fiha wa khayra ma ursilat bih
duas.meaning: O Allah, I ask You for the good of this wind, and the good of what is in it.

duas.title: Funeral Prayer
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِحَيِّنَا وَمَيِّتِنَا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma ghfir lihayyina wa mayyitina
duas.meaning: O Allah, forgive our living and our dead.

duas.title: Visiting Grave
duas.arabic: السَّلَامُ عَلَيْكُمْ أَهْلَ الدِّيَارِ مِنَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَالْمُسْلِمِينَ
duas.transliteration: As-salamu 'alaykum ahlad-diyar min al-mu'minina wal-muslimin
duas.meaning: Peace be upon you, O inhabitants of the dwellings, among the believers and Muslims.

duas.title: For Rizq
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اكْفِنِي بِحَلَالِكَ عَنْ حَرَامِكَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma ikfini bihalalika 'an haramika
duas.meaning: O Allah, suffice me with what You have made lawful instead of unlawful.

duas.title: Entering Market
duas.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ
duas.transliteration: La ilaha illallahu wahdahu la shareeka lah, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamd
duas.meaning: There is no god but Allah alone. His is the dominion and His is the praise.

duas.title: Breaking Fast (General)
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لَكَ صُمْتُ وَعَلَى رِزْقِكَ أَفْطَرْتُ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma laka sumtu wa 'ala rizqika aftartu
duas.meaning: O Allah, for You I fasted and with Your provision I broke my fast.

duas.title: Laylatul Qadr
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّكَ عَفُوٌّ تُحِبُّ الْعَفْوَ فَاعْفُ عَنِّي
duas.transliteration: Allahumma innaka 'afuwwun tuhibbul-'afwa fa'fu 'anni
duas.meaning: O Allah, You are Forgiving and love forgiveness, so forgive me.

duas.title: Before Marriage
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ ارْزُقْنِي زَوْجًا صَالِحًا يَتَّقِيكَ وَيُحِبُّكَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma urzuqni zawjan salihan yattaqeeka wa yuhibbuk
duas.meaning: O Allah, grant me a righteous spouse who fears and loves You.

duas.title: Wedding Night
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ خَيْرَهَا وَخَيْرَ مَا جَبَلْتَهَا عَلَيْهِ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka khayraha wa khayra ma jabaltaha 'alayh
duas.meaning: O Allah, I ask You for the good in her and the good of what You have created in her.

duas.title: For Righteous Offspring
duas.arabic: رَبِّ هَبْ لِي مِنْ لَدُنْكَ ذُرِّيَّةً طَيِّبَةً
duas.transliteration: Rabbi hab lee min ladunka dhurriyyatan tayyibah
duas.meaning: My Lord, grant me from Yourself a good offspring.

duas.title: Protecting Children
duas.arabic: أُعِيذُكُمَا بِكَلِمَاتِ اللَّهِ التَّامَّةِ مِنْ كُلِّ شَيْطَانٍ وَهَامَّةٍ
duas.transliteration: U'idhukuma bikalimatillahit-tammati min kulli shaytanin wa hammah
duas.meaning: I seek protection for you both in the perfect words of Allah from every devil and harmful creature.

duas.title: Freedom from Debt
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اقْضِ عَنِّي الدَّيْنَ وَأَغْنِنِي مِنَ الْفَقْرِ
duas.transliteration: Allahummaqdi 'annid-dayna wa aghnini minal-faqr
duas.meaning: O Allah, pay off my debt and enrich me from poverty.

duas.title: When Struggling with Debt
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ السَّمَاوَاتِ السَّبْعِ وَرَبَّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ اكْفِنِي شَرَّهُمْ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma Rabbas-samawatis-sab'i wa Rabbal-'arshil-'adheem ikfini sharrahum
duas.meaning: O Allah, Lord of the seven heavens and the Mighty Throne, suffice me against their evil.

duas.title: Before Wudu
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللهِ
duas.transliteration: Bismillah
duas.meaning: In the name of Allah.

duas.title: After Wudu
duas.arabic: أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ وَأَشْهَدُ أَنَّ مُحَمَّدًا عَبْدُهُ وَرَسُولُهُ
duas.transliteration: Ash-hadu an la ilaha illallahu wahdahu la shareeka lah, wa ash-hadu anna Muhammadan 'abduhu wa rasuluh
duas.meaning: I bear witness that there is no god but Allah alone, and Muhammad is His servant and Messenger.

duas.title: After Adhan
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ هَذِهِ الدَّعْوَةِ التَّامَّةِ وَالصَّلَاةِ الْقَائِمَةِ آتِ مُحَمَّدًا الْوَسِيلَةَ وَالْفَضِيلَةَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma Rabba hadhihid-da'watit-tammah was-salatil-qaimah, ati Muhammadanil-wasilata wal-fadilah
duas.meaning: O Allah, Lord of this perfect call and established prayer, grant Muhammad the intercession and excellence.

duas.title: Before Sleep (Ayatul Kursi)
duas.arabic: اللَّهُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ
duas.transliteration: Allahu la ilaha illa Huwal-Hayyul-Qayyum
duas.meaning: Recite Ayatul Kursi for protection from Satan during sleep.

duas.title: Morning Du'a (Full)
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بِكَ أَصْبَحْنَا وَبِكَ أَمْسَيْنَا وَبِكَ نَحْيَا وَبِكَ نَمُوتُ وَإِلَيْكَ النُّشُورُ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma bika asbahna wa bika amsayna wa bika nahya wa bika namutu wa ilaykan-nushur
duas.meaning: O Allah, by You we enter the morning, by You we enter the evening, by You we live, by You we die, and to You is the resurrection.

duas.title: Evening Du'a (Full)
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بِكَ أَمْسَيْنَا وَبِكَ أَصْبَحْنَا وَبِكَ نَحْيَا وَبِكَ نَمُوتُ وَإِلَيْكَ الْمَصِيرُ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma bika amsayna wa bika asbahna wa bika nahya wa bika namutu wa ilaykal-masir
duas.meaning: O Allah, by You we enter the evening, by You we enter the morning, by You we live, by You we die, and to You is the final return.

duas.title: Leaving Home
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللهِ تَوَكَّلْتُ عَلَى اللهِ لَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللهِ
duas.transliteration: Bismillahi tawakkaltu 'alallah, la hawla wa la quwwata illa billah
duas.meaning: In the name of Allah, I place my trust in Allah. There is no might nor power except with Allah.

duas.title: Vehicle Dua
duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي سَخَّرَ لَنَا هَذَا وَمَا كُنَّا لَهُ مُقْرِنِينَ
duas.transliteration: Subhanal-lathee sakhkhara lana hadha wa ma kunna lahu muqrineen
duas.meaning: Glory to Him who has subjected this to us, though we could not have done it ourselves.

duas.title: When Guest Eats
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ لَهُمْ فِيمَا رَزَقْتَهُمْ وَاغْفِرْ لَهُمْ وَارْحَمْهُمْ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma barik lahum fee ma razaqtahum, waghfir lahum warhamhum
duas.meaning: O Allah, bless them in what You have provided them, forgive them and have mercy on them.

duas.title: Before Studying
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اخْرِجْنِي مِنْ ظُلُمَاتِ الْوَهْمِ وَأَكْرِمْنِي بِنُورِ الْفَهْمِ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma akhrijnee min dhulumatil-wahmi wa akrimnee binooril-fahm
duas.meaning: O Allah, take me out from the darkness of illusion and honor me with the light of understanding.

duas.title: For Sick Person
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اشْفِهِ شِفَاءً لَا يُغَادِرُ سَقَمًا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma-ishfihi shifa'an la yughadiru saqama
duas.meaning: O Allah, cure him with a cure that leaves no illness behind.

duas.title: Morning Protection (7x)
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللهِ الَّذِي لَا يَضُرُّ مَعَ اسْمِهِ شَيْءٌ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَلَا فِي السَّمَاءِ
duas.transliteration: Bismillahil-lathee la yadurru ma'asmihi shay'un fil-ardi wa la fis-sama'
duas.meaning: In the name of Allah, with whose name nothing on earth or in heaven can harm. Recite 3x morning, 3x evening.

duas.title: Istighfar (100x daily)
duas.arabic: أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللهَ وَأَتُوبُ إِلَيْهِ
duas.transliteration: Astaghfirullaha wa atubu ilayh
duas.meaning: I seek forgiveness from Allah and repent to Him.

duas.title: Entering House
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللهِ وَلَجْنَا وَبِسْمِ اللهِ خَرَجْنَا وَعَلَى اللهِ رَبِّنَا تَوَكَّلْنَا
duas.transliteration: Bismillahi walajna wa bismillahi kharajna wa 'alallahi Rabbina tawakkalna
duas.meaning: In the name of Allah we enter, in the name of Allah we exit, and upon Allah our Lord we rely.

duas.title: Leaving House
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللهِ تَوَكَّلْتُ عَلَى اللهِ اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ أَنْ أَضِلَّ أَوْ أُضَلَّ
duas.transliteration: Bismillahi tawakkaltu 'alallah, Allahumma inni a'udhu bika an adilla aw udalla
duas.meaning: In the name of Allah, I trust in Allah. O Allah, I seek refuge in You from misleading or being misled.

duas.title: Qunut (Witr)
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اهْدِنِي فِيمَنْ هَدَيْتَ وَعَافِنِي فِيمَنْ عَافَيْتَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma-hdini feeman hadayta, wa 'afini feeman 'afayta
duas.meaning: O Allah, guide me among those You have guided, and grant me health among those You have granted health.

duas.title: Leaving Makkah
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لَا تَجْعَلْهُ آخِرَ الْعَهْدِ مِنْ بَيْتِكَ الْحَرَامِ وَارْزُقْنِي الْعَوْدَ إِلَيْهِ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma la taj'alhu akhiral-'ahdi min baytikal-haram, warzuqnil-'awda ilayh
duas.meaning: O Allah, do not make this my last visit to Your Sacred House, and grant me return to it.

duas.title: At Mina
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْهُ حَجًّا مَبْرُورًا وَسَعْيًا مَشْكُورًا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma-j'alhu hajjan mabrooran wa sa'yan mashkooran
duas.meaning: O Allah, make this an accepted Hajj and a thanked effort.

duas.title: Suhoor
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ لَنَا فِيمَا رَزَقْتَنَا وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma barik lana fee ma razaqtana wa qina 'adhaban-nar
duas.meaning: O Allah, bless us in what You have provided us and protect us from the punishment of the Fire.

duas.title: Taraweeh
duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ذِي الْمُلْكِ وَالْمَلَكُوتِ سُبْحَانَ ذِي الْعِزَّةِ وَالْعَظَمَةِ وَالْهَيْبَةِ وَالْقُدْرَةِ
duas.transliteration: Subhana dhil-mulki wal-malakoot, subhana dhil-'izzati wal-'adhamati wal-haybati wal-qudrah
duas.meaning: Glory to the Owner of Sovereignty and Kingdom, Glory to the Owner of Honor, Greatness, Awe and Power.

duas.title: For Harmony
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَلِّفْ بَيْنَ قُلُوبِنَا وَأَصْلِحْ ذَاتَ بَيْنِنَا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma allif bayna quloobina wa aslih dhata baynina
duas.meaning: O Allah, unite our hearts and reconcile between us.

duas.title: Child's Protection
duas.arabic: يُوصِيكُمُ اللَّهُ فِي أَوْلَادِكُمْ
duas.transliteration: Yooseekumullahu fee awladikum
duas.meaning: Allah instructs you concerning your children. Recite Ayatul Kursi and last 2 verses of Al-Baqarah.

duas.title: Barakah in Wealth
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ لَنَا فِيمَا رَزَقْتَنَا وَلَا تَجْعَلْنَا مِنَ الْغَافِلِينَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma barik lana fee ma razaqtana wa la taj'alna minal-ghafileen
duas.meaning: O Allah, bless us in what You have provided us and do not make us among the heedless.

duas.title: General Good (Comprehensive)
duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَفِي الْآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ
duas.transliteration: Rabbana atina fid-dunya hasanatan wa fil-akhirati hasanatan wa qina 'adhaban-nar
duas.meaning: Our Lord, give us good in this world and good in the Hereafter, and protect us from the Fire.
